$comment: D-CSUBSET-LOCAL-STATIC: block-scope `static` locals get static storage duration (C 6.2.4) — a hidden module-global, function-internal name, once-only load-time init — so values PERSIST across calls. Exit 42 iff all persist correctly. RED-ON-DISABLE: revert the cst_to_hir staticStorage arm (static -> stack VarDecl) -> each call re-inits -> tick()=1,1,1 -> exit 7.
